scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "bun run dev:server" "bun run dev:web"
scripts.real: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "bun run real:server" "bun run real:web"
scripts.real:web: vite build --config src/web/vite.config.ts && vite preview --config src/web/vite.config.ts
scripts.dev:proxy: bun run proxy; bun run dev
scripts.real:proxy: bun run proxy; bun run real
scripts.build:hooks: bun build templates/preToolUse.ts --target=bun --outfile dist/agents/preToolUse.js && bun build templates/stopHook.ts --target=bun --outfile dist/agents/stopHook.js
scripts.build:agents: bun run build:worker && bun run build:hooks
scripts.build:desktop: bun run build:web && bun run build:agents && electrobun build
scripts.dev:desktop: bun run build:web && bun run build:agents && KANBAN_REPO_ROOT="$PWD" electrobun dev
scripts.link:desktop-data: DATA="$HOME/Library/Application Support/kanban-agents"; mkdir -p "$DATA" uploads && rm -f "$DATA/config.json" "$DATA/kanban.db" "$DATA/kanban.db-wal" "$DATA/kanban.db-shm" && rm -rf "$DATA/uploads" && ln -s "$PWD/config.json" "$DATA/config.json" && ln -s "$PWD/kanban-real.db" "$DATA/kanban.db" && ln -s "$PWD/uploads" "$DATA/uploads" && echo "Linked desktop data to repo: config.json + kanban-real.db + uploads/"
